title: coleus plantagineus
intro: Coleus plantagineus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus scutellarioides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the coleus plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural remedy for colds, fever, and digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus plantagineus include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparation of Coleus plantagineus typically involves the leaves being dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
